author: y4rr
content:
Phase 4 complete. APPROVE.

Diff (uncommitted, ready):
- ferrotorch-vision/src/models/{convnext,densenet,efficientnet,inception,mobilenet,resnet,swin,unet,vgg,vit,yolo}.rs (+10 files): Module::named_children() overrides on the model and its sub-modules (Bottleneck, BasicBlock, etc.). 42 named_children impls across 17 files.
- ferrotorch-vision/src/models/{detection/faster_rcnn,detection/mask_rcnn,detection/ssd,segmentation/aspp,segmentation/deeplabv3,segmentation/fcn}.rs: same.
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/probe_named_children_walk.rs (NEW): probe-before-fix that builds a fresh ResNet50, walks named_descendants_dyn(), asserts BN paths exposed AND downcast to BatchNorm2d via Phase 2's as_any hook. 2/2 pass.
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs (+707): remap_torchvision_to_ferrotorch_vit_keys with QKV tensor split (in_proj_weight [3*E, E] → q/k/v_proj [E, E] each; same for bias). New tests: vit_b_16_value_parity (PASS!), 4 vit_b_16 probe tests (PASS), loader_applies_bn_buffers_to_real_resnet50 (PASS — Phase 2 BN loader end-to-end on a real ResNet50 instance). #[ignore=#999] removed for ViT. Dead #860 cascade_skip branches at lines 149/241 cleaned up.
- scripts/regenerate_vision_fixtures.py (+46): resnet50 builder switched to weights=ResNet50_Weights.DEFAULT (real ImageNet-1k pretrained, IMAGENET1K_V2). ViT generator uses torchvision.models.vit_b_16(weights=None) with seed.
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance/fixtures_value_parity.json: ResNet50 entry sha256 changed (now pretrained); ViT entry added.
- CHANGELOG.md: Added entry citing #999 + #995 + ResNet50 pretrained-weight upgrade.

The milestone: ResNet50 value-parity now PASSes against torchvision's REAL ImageNet pretrained weights (ResNet50_Weights.DEFAULT / IMAGENET1K_V2). First proof in the series of true torchvision-parity on a real model with non-trivial running statistics. ViT is the second PASS-able value-parity model via test-side QKV-aware remap.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision: 690 passed, 0 failed, 42 ignored (12 test bins all green)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --lib: 1184 passed, 0 failed
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test probe_named_children_walk: 2 passed
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity vit_b_16 resnet50: 22 passed, 0 failed
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty
- 17 vision src/ model files have fn named_children
- 42 named_children impls total (sub-structs counted)

Coordination boundaries 100% respected.

Truncation note: subagent's report cut off mid-sentence at 'Let me finalize CHANGELOG'. State checks confirmed full completion: probe present and passing, all 17 named_children overrides in place, ViT remap function with QKV split present, ResNet50 pretrained config in regenerator, #999 #[ignore] removed, cascade_skip dead branches gone, CHANGELOG entry added. Truncation was a reporting failure, not a work failure.

Closing #999, #995, #1001.
